---
name: Content proposal
about: Suggest a new skill, archetype, category playbook, or substantial addition
title: '[PROPOSAL] '
labels: enhancement, content
assignees: ''
---

## What do you want to add?

A clear, specific description of the proposed content. Examples:

- "A new category playbook for healthcare/medical product sites."
- "A new archetype: 'Y2K Revival' — distinct from Brutalist Industrial in tone and references."
- "An additional working example: animated data visualization with D3 + GSAP."

## Why is this missing?

What gap does it fill that the existing content doesn't cover?

## Scope and length

Roughly how big is this? (One section, one new file, multiple files?)

## Your qualifications (optional but helpful)

Why are you positioned to write this? Have you shipped projects in this category? Are you a working designer / developer in the relevant space?

## Voice and quality check

Before opening this issue, please skim:
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` voice and style guide
- At least one existing playbook or archetype to match the standard

Confirm:
- [ ] I will write in the existing voice (direct, opinionated, specific, no hype).
- [ ] I will cite real-world references and brands.
- [ ] I will acknowledge trade-offs honestly.
- [ ] I have read the "What we don't accept" section of CONTRIBUTING.md.

## Outline (optional)

A rough table of contents for what you'd write. Helps maintainers evaluate scope before you invest time.
